profile_persona.headline: Senior Laravel Developer
profile_persona.summary: Backend engineer specialising in Laravel APIs, Vue frontends, and PostgreSQL at scale.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
highlights: Led migration of monolith to Laravel 11 microservices serving 40k daily users
Built internal admin tooling with Vue 3 and Inertia

experience.title: PHP Developer
highlights: Maintained legacy PHP apps and introduced PHPUnit coverage

job_context.title: Senior Laravel Engineer
job_context.description_snippet: Build billing and API services with Laravel, Vue, and PostgreSQL. Hybrid in Bristol. Competitive UK salary.
